'''鈭歞-p-j-zh''' ('''kadapjezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:issue|issue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:issue|issue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-p-j-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadapjezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidapjezhoko|thidapjezhoko]] || [[word:jidapjezhoko|jidapjezhoko]] || [[word:shidapjezhoko|shidapjezhoko]] || [[word:kidapjezhoko|kidapjezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudapjezhoko|thuthudapjezhoko]] || [[word:jujudapjezhoko|jujudapjezhoko]] || [[word:shushudapjezhoko|shushudapjezhoko]] || [[word:kukudapjezhoko|kukudapjezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
